# [Clang] Assertion `IsExpectedEntity(FD1) && FD2 && IsExpectedEntity(FD2) && "use non-instantiated function declaration for constraints partial " "ordering"` failed.

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/175426

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang assertions trunk crashed and goes back to 19.1 with `-std=c++20` flag.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/acrvxh4Kn

However, the original test case goes back to 11.0. 
When I reduce the code the crash disappear.
Here is the full code: https://godbolt.org/z/bn69eY74e

## Program
```cpp
template <typename T1> auto fwd2(const T1 &t1) {
  return [](auto &&...ts1) {
    struct LocalType {
      int data;
      auto operator<=>(const LocalType &other) const = default;
    };
    LocalType x{42}, y{42};
    static_assert(noexcept(x < y), "Noexcept check failed");
  }();
}

int main() { return fwd2(1); }
```


## Comments

### Comment 1 - keinflue

The test case as is is crash-on-invalid, but a slight modification also crashes and is valid (https://godbolt.org/z/fTc8orr73):
```cpp
#include<compare>

template <typename T1> auto fwd2(const T1 &t1) {
  return [](auto &&...ts1) {
    struct LocalType {
      int data;
      auto operator<=>(const LocalType &other) const = default;
    };
    LocalType x{42}, y{42};
    static_assert(noexcept(x < y), "Noexcept check failed");
  }();
}

int main() { fwd2(1); }
```
@EugeneZelenko Any recommendation for tagging `crash-on-valid` vs `crash-on-invalid` in this case?

The non-reduced test case produces a different assertion, which makes me think that it is/was a distinct issue:
```
clang++: /root/llvm-project/clang/lib/Sema/SemaTemplateInstantiate.cpp:3621: llvm::PointerUnion<clang::Decl*, llvm::SmallVector<clang::VarDecl*, 4>*>* clang::LocalInstantiationScope::findInstantiationOf(const clang::Decl*): Assertion `isa<LabelDecl>(D) && "declaration not instantiated in this scope"' failed.
```

---

### Comment 2 - llvmbot


@llvm/issue-subscribers-clang-frontend

Author: Jireh Guo (Xniao)

<details>
***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang assertions trunk crashed and goes back to 19.1 with `-std=c++20` flag.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/acrvxh4Kn

However, the original test case goes back to 11.0. 
When I reduce the code the crash disappear.
Here is the full code: https://godbolt.org/z/bn69eY74e

## Program
```cpp
template &lt;typename T1&gt; auto fwd2(const T1 &amp;t1) {
  return [](auto &amp;&amp;...ts1) {
    struct LocalType {
      int data;
      auto operator&lt;=&gt;(const LocalType &amp;other) const = default;
    };
    LocalType x{42}, y{42};
    static_assert(noexcept(x &lt; y), "Noexcept check failed");
  }();
}

int main() { return fwd2(1); }
```

## Stack Dump
```bash
&lt;source&gt;:5:7: error: cannot default 'operator&lt;=&gt;' because type 'std::strong_ordering' was not found; include &lt;compare&gt;
    5 |       auto operator&lt;=&gt;(const LocalType &amp;other) const = default;
      |       ^
&lt;source&gt;:3:12: note: in instantiation of member class 'LocalType' requested here
    3 |     struct LocalType {
      |            ^
&lt;source&gt;:2:10: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'fwd2(const int &amp;)::(lambda)::operator()&lt;&gt;' requested here
    2 |   return [](auto &amp;&amp;...ts1) {
      |          ^
&lt;source&gt;:12:21: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'fwd2&lt;int&gt;' requested here
   12 | int main() { return fwd2(1); }
      |                     ^
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/Sema/SemaConcept.cpp:2470: bool clang::Sema::IsAtLeastAsConstrained(const clang::NamedDecl*, llvm::MutableArrayRef&lt;clang::AssociatedConstraint&gt;, const clang::NamedDecl*, llvm::MutableArrayRef&lt;clang::AssociatedConstraint&gt;, bool&amp;): Assertion `IsExpectedEntity(FD1) &amp;&amp; FD2 &amp;&amp; IsExpectedEntity(FD2) &amp;&amp; "use non-instantiated function declaration for constraints partial " "ordering"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: /opt/compiler-explorer/clang-assertions-trunk/bin/clang++ -g -o /app/output.s -mllvm --x86-asm-syntax=intel -fno-verbose-asm -S --gcc-toolchain=/opt/compiler-explorer/gcc-snapshot -fcolor-diagnostics -fno-crash-diagnostics -std=c++20 &lt;source&gt;
```
